message: 🌱 Add slimtoolkit: Console output as json with a flag to control when the mission (#712)

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "slimtoolkit-253-console-output-as-json-with-a-flag-to-control-when-the-console-o",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "slimtoolkit: Console output as json with a flag to control when the console output is free form text and when it's json",
+    "description": "Console output as json with a flag to control when the console output is free form text and when it's json. Requested by 0+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current slimtoolkit deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your slimtoolkit version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n slimtoolkit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=slimtoolkit\nhelm list -n slimtoolkit 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working slimtoolkit installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review slimtoolkit configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant slimtoolkit configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n slimtoolkit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=slimtoolkit\nkubectl get configmap -n slimtoolkit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=slimtoolkit\n```\nNeed to have a global flag to control the console output mode (`--json-output` or something like that)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Console output as json with a flag to control when the",
+        "description": "when are you online? I can give you an overview.\n\nA few notes to get you started in the meantime...\n\nThe docker-slim I/O happens using the `ExecutionContext` construct ( https://github.com/docker-slim/docker-slim/blob/master/pkg/app/execontext.go ). The`ExecutionContext.Output.Info()`,\n```yaml\nxc.Out.Info(\"params\",\n\t\t\t\tovars{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"target.type\":   \"image\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"target\":        targetRef,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"continue.mode\": continueAfter.Mode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"rt.as.user\":    doRunTargetAsUser,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"keep.perms\":    doKeepPerms,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"tags\":          strings.Join(outputTags, \",\"),\n\t\t\t\t})\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n slimtoolkit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=slimtoolkit\nkubectl get events -n slimtoolkit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Console output as json with a flag to control when the\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "when are you online? I can give you an overview.\n\nA few notes to get you started in the meantime...\n\nThe docker-slim I/O happens using the `ExecutionContext` construct ( https://github.com/docker-slim/docker-slim/blob/master/pkg/app/execontext.go ).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "xc.Out.Info(\"params\",\n\t\t\t\tovars{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"target.type\":   \"image\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\"target\":        targetRef,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"continue.mode\": continueAfter.Mode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"rt.as.user\":    doRunTargetAsUser,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"keep.perms\":    doKeepPerms,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"tags\":          strings.Join(outputTags, \",\"),\n\t\t\t\t})"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
